message:
fix(demo,widgets): update Evidence Ledger terminology and fix unicode test

app.rs:
- Remove unused VoiLogEntry import
- Update command palette action descriptions from "Bayes factors" to "VOI"
- Clarify Evidence Ledger docs: shows VOI sampling decisions with
  posterior math, Bayes factors, and e-process evidence

property_tests.rs:
- Fix unicode_search_correctness test assertion
- Emoji after space is at word boundary, so MatchType should be WordStart
- Add comment explaining why emoji gets WordStart classification

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
